title: Crispy Kenyan Swede Fritters
description: A delicious Kenyan-inspired dish made with swede, a type of root vegetable, that's crispy on the outside and tender on the inside.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the grated swede to the pan and fry until golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the swede from the oil and place on a paper towels to drain excess oil.
Season the swede with salt to taste.
Serve the crispy swede fritters with sliced flatbread and crispy fried onions.
Enjoy as a snack or side dish.
